content: agent1: implementing 'Add support for removing all metadata in exif_transpose' - adding strip_metadata param to ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py, plus tests in Tests/test_imageops.py. Will touch ImageOps.py exif_transpose function only.
